title: Endpoint /libpod/manifests/{name:.*}/json response JSON inconsistent
body:
The swagger documentation reports the field name of "MIMEType" while the code returns "mediaType".  This should be corrected. 

Which field name is expected?

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

I think when we looked at this in a meeting a while back, the  underlying field in the type definition for a v2s2 manifest list (github.com/containers/image/v5/manifest.Schema2List, or github.com/distribution/distribution/v3/manifest/manifestlist.ManifestList) is called MediaType, so the consensus was to call it that.
